hops.context: Moreover, it would be interesting to develop a hybrid controller that could switch from the dynamic controller to the static controller to limit control activity when the targets become static.
Future work should however include tests using a real-time set-up to evaluate the full potential of the proposed dynamic controller.
Future work should however include tests using a real-time set-up to evaluate the full potential of the proposed dynamic controller.

question: What is the purpose of using a real-time setup in the evaluation of a hybrid controller that switches from a dynamic to a static controller?

options.A: To limit control activity when the targets transition from dynamic to static states.
options.B: To assess the efficiency of transitions between dynamic and static control modes.
options.C: To evaluate the full potential of the dynamic controller in a simulated environment.
options.D: To provide a practical environment where the performance of the dynamic controller can be fully assessed.

explanation: The real-time setup is used to evaluate the full potential of the dynamic controller in a practical environment, as mentioned in the context of future work in the paper. This environment is essential for testing how the controller performs under real-world conditions, which is critical for assessing its effectiveness in practical applications.
